summary: The omnicogg skill hid a malicious payload at the start of a README.md padded with 22 MB of filler to exceed scanner size limits and evade detection.
details: First disclosed by JFrog Security Research (March 2026) and analyzed by Unit42: the malicious payload appears at the start of the README.md, followed by 22 MB of padding characters that inflate the file beyond the size limits many content-analysis pipelines enforce, bypassing both ClawScan and VirusTotal. Reported to ClawHub and removed.
